title: ModExp via SQIR-layout modmult (modmult_MCP_gate):  x -> a^x mod N  =  exponent-controlled chain of modular multipliers   [bits=2, anc = sqir_modmult_rev_anc, dim 3*bits+1 = 7 -- fewer ancilla]
input: e = q0..q3 = exponent x (control bits);   w = q4..q10 = |1> data + SQIR workspace (anc = sqir_modmult_rev_anc bits)
output: w data register = a^x mod N;  workspace restored.   each box = the verified modmult_MCP_gate (ModMult), controlled by one exponent bit

blocks.label:
x a^(2^0)
mod N
ctrl e0

x a^(2^1)
mod N
ctrl e1

x a^(2^2)
mod N
ctrl e2

x a^(2^3)
mod N
ctrl e3
